title: Micrampelis araneosa
taxonomy: Micrampelis araneosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant is classified as a type of viburnum, specifically a member of the Micrampelis genus. The classification of Micrampelis araneosa places it within the larger family of Adoxaceae, which also includes other flowering plants. Further classification can be made by considering its specific characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
